data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18848C: I only register four players for\nPOKéMON CONTESTS.\pIf three other players link up, all\nfour may enter the same CONTEST.\pWould you like to take part?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188521: Before entering a CONTEST, your\nprogress will be saved.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188559: We hope you will participate another\ntime.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188584: Would you like to enter a CONTEST?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1885A7:
When four players are ready, connect
over a Game Link cable, and register\lwith me, please.\pPlease choose the same CONTEST
as your fellow contestants.\pThe CONTEST begins as soon as all
players register their entry.\pAfter that, the usual CONTEST rules
apply.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_81886A8: Once you have linked up, please choose\nthe CONTEST.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1886DC: Which CONTEST would you like to enter?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188703: Which POKéMON would you like to enter?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188750: You may have chosen a different\nCONTEST than another player.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18878D: You may have made a different\nchoice than another player.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1887C7: Please wait.\nPress the B Button to cancel...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1887F4: We hope you will participate\nanother time.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188845: Your POKéMON will be entered in\nthe CONTEST.\pYour POKéMON is Entry No. {STR_VAR_2}.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_8188890: Entry No. {STR_VAR_2} is assigned this color\nfor this CONTEST.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_81888E6: Please come through this way.\nGood luck!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18890F: Congratulations!\pI did a painting of your POKéMON to\ncommemorate its victory...\pWell, your POKéMON's appeals were\nso fantastic, it spurred me into\lpainting better than I usually do.\lLook, see?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_81889D0: The screen switches to display the\npainting.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1889FD:
What do you think? I'm confident in
what I've done, but do you like it?\pA work of this caliber, it wouldn't look
out of place in an art museum.\pHuh? An art museum really is looking
for paintings?\pDo you think I should take this there?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188AE8:
What, really? Then, sure, I will take
this painting there right now.\pI'll give it a proper title, too.\pI hope they'll like it and consider
exhibiting this.\pPlease check if they did accept this.
Thank you!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188BB5: Oh, that's right!\pAs a memento of me painting your\nPOKéMON, please take this.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188C41: Oh... Then, I guess I'll just take\nthis home with me...\pBut, you know, I would like to take\nthis to the art museum... Okay?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188CBD: Oh, fine, that's the way it is.\nI will hang this in my own house.\pI'll just have to try harder next time.\nWell, be seeing you.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188D3C: Hoo, boy... Master Rank CONTESTS,\nhere I come.\pThe world will know that my dearest\nPOKéMON is the cutest being in all\lexistence. The time has come!\lUheheheh.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188DDA: You can see a whole variety of\nPOKéMON here.\pThat's why I make this place a regular\npart of my daily stroll.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188E47:
Oh, dear! They still haven't given
you a CONTEST PASS?\pYou should go get one in VERDANTURF
TOWN right away.\pIt's such a thrill having others see
POKéMON that you've raised with care\land love.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188F07: When you get up to the Master Rank\nCONTESTS, you get your eyes opened\lto striking POKéMON that just scream\lto be painted.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188F81: The TOUGHNESS CONTEST is like\nextreme, man!\pThose muscular appeals...\nCascading sweat... I swoon!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188FE3: Day in and day out, I lavished my care\non this POKéMON.\pIts condition is peaking.\nToday, victory is mine!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18904D: I made {POKEBLOCK}S with Mom, Dad and\nBig Sister. They turned out great!\pI bet you can make smoother, better\n{POKEBLOCK}S if you have more people.
